name: Hera Lending
description_short: Private lender specializing in real estate investment loans including DSCR, fix-and-flip, bridge, and construction financing. Headquartered in Miami with $1.5B+ in funded loans nationwide.
description_long:
Hera Lending is a private lending company headquartered in Miami, Florida, that has funded over $1.5 billion in loans across the United States. Founded with more than 5 years of industry experience, the company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banks for real estate investors seeking faster capital access and more flexible underwriting criteria.

The company offers four primary loan products: DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for rental property investors, fix-and-flip loans for short-term property renovations, bridge loans for quick capital needs between transactions, and ground-up construction loans for developers building residential properties from scratch. All products are asset-based rather than credit-score dependent, and the company claims 10-12 day approval timelines. Loan sizes range from $300K to $2M+, with interest-only payment options available on certain products.

Hera Lending differentiates itself through direct lender status (no broker intermediaries), nationwide licensing across 84% of U.S. coverage, multi-state expertise in regional regulations and market conditions, and tailored loan structuring rather than standardized terms. The company emphasizes speed of closing, flexibility in underwriting, and understanding of local real estate markets across different regions.

As a private lender, Hera Lending serves a specific market segment—real estate investors—rather than consumers seeking personal credit solutions. The company's products are designed for portfolio growth and investment income, not personal use. Borrowers should note that private lending typically carries higher interest rates than traditional bank mortgages, and the 10-12 day approval timeline is presented as an advantage but may reflect less rigorous underwriting than institutional lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 10-12 day approval timeline compared to weeks or months with traditional banks
Asset-based lending focus on property value rather than personal credit scores
Direct lender model eliminates broker intermediaries and allows direct communication with decision-makers
DSCR loans allow qualification based on property cash flow without requiring W-2s or tax returns
Nationwide licensing with documented coverage in Southeast, Southwest, Great Lakes, and Mid-Atlantic regions
Multiple loan products (DSCR, fix-and-flip, bridge, construction) tailored to different investment strategies
Experienced team with $1.5B+ in funded loans and 5+ years of proven track record
cons: As private lending, interest rates are significantly higher than traditional bank mortgages
Minimum loan amounts ($300K-$500K+) exclude smaller investors or properties
Asset-based lending still requires substantial property equity and collateral, limiting access for those with minimal down payments
Website provides no specific information about APR ranges, fees, or exact closing costs
Limited transparency on approval denial rates or actual approval timeline data to verify 10-12 day claims
best_for: Real estate investors with portfolios of 1-4 unit rental or fix-and-flip properties
Developers and builders needing construction financing for ground-up residential projects
Experienced investors seeking faster capital access than traditional banks for time-sensitive deals
Multi-state real estate operators needing consistent financing across different regional markets
diagnosis: Hera Lending is exclusively for real estate investors with existing property assets, not for personal credit needs or consumer loans. Best suited for experienced investors seeking faster closings and flexible underwriting than banks offer, but borrowers should expect higher interest rates typical of private lending and verify actual APR/fee structures before applying.
services: DSCR loans for rental property investors (no W-2/tax return required)
Fix-and-flip loans with interest-only payments for short-term property renovation
Bridge loans for quick interim financing between real estate transactions
Ground-up construction loans covering land acquisition plus construction phases
Direct lender origination with decision-maker access
Multi-state loan processing with regional market expertise
Nationwide funding across 84% of U.S. states
Flexible loan term structuring tailored to project goals
Fast draw schedules for construction and renovation projects
Hera Education and Hera Cares community/education programs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
